extension.summary: Little Fox — Turkish Series Player
extension.description:
Stream Turkish series with Arabic or English audio from multiple providers.
Supports IMDb and TMDB IDs. Compatible with AIO Metadata, TMDb Helper, Seren, and The Crew.
Features multi-provider search, smart server selection, quality ranking, and auto-translated subtitles.
extension.news:
v1.0.1 (2026-03-26) - NEW: Premium server selection dialog (poster, plot, color-coded badges) - NEW: Dedicated logger module - NEW: Accent bar: green=1080p, amber=720p/HD, slate=lower quality
v1.0.0 (2026-01-24) - Initial versioned release

extension.summary: Universal scrobbling and tracking service for Kodi
Universal scrobbling and tracking service for Kodi
extension.description: Little Rabite is a universal scrobbling and tracking service that automatically syncs your watch history across multiple platforms including Trakt.tv, AniList, and Simkl. Features include: - Automatic playback tracking and scrobbling - Continue Watching menu with resume points - Bidirectional sync with tracking services - Offline support with local database - Real-time progress updates - Support for movies and TV shows

Little Rabite is a universal scrobbling and tracking service that automatically syncs your watch history across multiple platforms including Trakt.tv, AniList, and Simkl. Features include: - Automatic playback tracking and scrobbling - Continue Watching menu with resume points - Bidirectional sync with tracking services - Offline support with local database - Real-time progress updates - Support for movies and TV shows
extension.disclaimer: Requires accounts with supported services (Trakt.tv, AniList, or Simkl). Internet connection required for syncing.
Requires accounts with supported services (Trakt.tv, AniList, or Simkl). Internet connection required for syncing.
extension.news:
v1.0.0 (2025-01-24) - Initial production release - Complete Trakt.tv integration - AniList integration with QR code authentication - Simkl integration with PIN flow - Automatic playback tracking and scrobbling - Continue Watching menu with resume points - Background syncing service - Local database for offline support - OAuth authentication for Trakt - Real-time progress updates
v0.1.0 (2025-01-20) - Beta release - Core infrastructure - Database and service architecture

extension.summary: Little Racun - Bridge Stremio with Kodi
extension.description: Little Racun bridges the Stremio addon AIO Metadata (aiometadata.elfhosted.com) with Kodi, providing seamless access to multiple streaming catalogs and metadata sources. Supports TMDB, TVDB, MAL, Netflix, HBO Max, Disney+, and more. Integrates with Stremio Bridge, Fen Light, Otaku, and other Kodi players.
extension.news:
v2.1.0 (2026-01-23) - Rebranded to Little Racun 🦝 - Player management in Settings - Download players from URL - View and delete players - Smart episode ID translation - On-demand IMDB/TMDB translation - Season folder grouping - Fast browsing (10x performance improvement)
v2.0.0 (2026-01-23) - Complete code refactor - modular architecture - Extended provider grouping (TMDB, TVDB, MAL, streaming) - 65% fewer menu entries with organized folders - Search functionality fixed - All features preserved and enhanced - Much more maintainable codebase

extension.summary: Little Tigre 🐯 - Your Friendly Streaming Companion
extension.description: Little Tigre bridges TMDb Helper or any metadat addons to Stremio addons (Comet, Torrentio, MediaFusion, AIO Streams) with full anime support. Professional Router-Controller-Service architecture. Features: multi-debrid support (Real-Debrid, Torbox), Kitsu/MAL/AniList anime IDs, metadata persistence, color-coded streams, cached stream prioritization, smart filtering.
extension.news:
v1.0.1 (2026-03-26) - NEW: Bit depth detection (10bit/12bit/8bit) shown alongside codec - NEW: Release flag badges: [PROPER], [REPACK], [DUBBED] - IMPROVED: Stream metadata detection using word-boundary regexes
v1.0.0 (2026-01-23) - Initial versioned release

extension.summary: Continue Watching and browse lists from Trakt, AniList and Simkl
extension.description: Rabite Watch pulls your watch progress and lists from Trakt, AniList, and Simkl. Features: - Continue Watching with resume points aggregated from all services - Browse Watchlist / Watching / Watched / Dropped per service - Resume percentage stored per service and merged into a single smart resume point - Force-resume or jump to exact position when playing - No scrobbling - pure pull and browse addon

extension.summary: TMDb Helfer
TMDb Helper
TMDb 助手
extension.description: TMDb Helper liefert Details über Filme, Fernsehsendungen und Schauspieler aus TMDb. Benutzer können auf eine Vielzahl von Listen aus TMDb TVDb MDbList und Trakt zugreifen.
TMDb Helper provides details about movies, tvshows and actors from TMDb. Users can access a variety of lists from TMDb TVDb MDbList and Trakt.
TMDb Helper dostarcza szczegółowych informacji o filmach, serialach i aktorach z serwisu TMDb. Użytkownicy mają dostęp do szeregu list z serwisów TMDb, TVDb, MDbList i Trakt.
TMDb Helper tillhandahåller information om filmer, tv-serier och skådespelare från TMDb. Användare kan få tillgång till en mängd olika listor från TMDb, TVDb, MDbList och Trakt.
TMDb 助手从 TMDb（影视数据库） 获取电影、电视剧及演员的详细信息。用户可访问来自 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList 和 Trakt 的各类影视列表。
extension.disclaimer: Daten bereitgestellt von TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV und Trakt. Einige der Informationen werden von TheTVDB.com bereitgestellt. Bitte erwäge sie zu unterstützen. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data provided by TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV and Trakt. Some of the information is provided by TheTVDB.com. Please consider supporting them. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Dane dostarczane przez TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV i Trakt. Niektóre informacje pochodzą z serwisu TheTVDB.com. Prosimy o rozważenie wsparcia tych serwisów. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data tillhandahållen av TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV och Trakt. En del av informationen tillhandahålls av TheTVDB.com. Stöd dem gärna. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
数据由 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList、OMDb、FanartTV 和 Trakt 提供。部分信息由 TheTVDB.com 提供，建议您支持他们。订阅链接：https://thetvdb.com/subscribe

extension.summary: Tralalaoh's Kodi Addons
extension.description: Repository for 3SK Video and other addons.

extension.summary: littleduck Helper Service
extension.description: Background service for littleduck skin. Provides ratings integration (MDbList API), widget management, unified search, and dynamic content loading. This addon runs automatically in the background when using the littleduck skin.
extension.disclaimer: Requires littleduck skin to function properly.
extension.news: v0.6.21 - Service addon now manageable in Add-ons → Services section

extension.summary: Resolve common video host URL's to be playable in XBMC/Kodi.
Resolver enlaces a videos de sitios populares para poder reproducirlos en XBMC/Kodi.
Prilagodi najčešće URL-ove video izvora kako bi radili u XBMC/Kodiju.
Επίλυση συνδέσμων κοινών εξυπηρετητών σε μορφή βίντεο ικανό για αναπαραγωγή στο XBMC/Kodi.
extension.description: Resolve common video host URL's to be playable in XBMC/Kodi, simplify addon development of video plugins requiring multi video hosts.
Επίλυση συνδέσμων κοινών εξυπηρετητών σε μορφή βίντεο ικανό για αναπαραγωγή στο XBMC/Kodi, απλοποίηση της ανάπτυξης των προσθέτων που χρησιμοποιούν πολλαπλούς εξυπηρετητές για υλικό βίντεο
Prilagodi najčešće URL-ove video izvora kako bi radili u XBMC/Kodiju, pojednostavnjuje razvoj priključaka za video dodatke koji zahtjevaju višestruke video izvore.
extension.disclaimer: This script only resolves video content from legitimate file lockers without prejudice. If this script is being used by 3rd parties to resolve content that you feel infringes upon your Intellectual Property then please take your complaints to the actual website or developer linking to such content and not here. This script in no way searches for any content whatsoever.

Το ανωτέρο σενάριο το μόνο που κάνει είναι να επιλύει οπτικοακουστικό περιεχόμενο από νόμιμες πηγές χωρίς προκατάληψη. Εάν το ανωτέρο σενάριο χρησιμοποιηθεί από τρίτους ώστε να επιλύσει περιεχόμενο το οποίο σας προκαλεί αντίδραση ότι παραβιάζει την πνευματική σας ιδιοκτησία παρακαλώ μεταφέρετε τα παραπονά σας στον ιστότοπο τον οποίο βρίσκεται το εν λόγω περιεχόμενο η τον δημιουργό ο οποίος πραγματοποιεί την σύνδεση και όχι εδω. Το σενάριο αυτό ουδεμία περίπτωση πραγματοποιεί αναζήτηση περιεχομένου.

extension.summary: Skin Variables helps skinners to construct variables and expressions for multiple containers and listitems using a template
Skin Variables aide les skinners à créer des variables et des expressions pour plusieurs conteneurs et listes à l'aide d'un modèle
extension.description: Skin Variables helps skinners to construct variables and expressions for multiple containers and listitems using a template
Skin Variables aide les skinners à créer des variables et des expressions pour plusieurs conteneurs et listes à l'aide d'un modèle

extension.summary: littleduck skin by Tralalaoh (Estuary MOD)
littleduck skin by Tralalaoh (Estuary MOD)
littleduck skin by Tralalaoh (Estuary MOD)
extension.description: littleduck is a custom Kodi skin built on Estuary with a Netflix-inspired dark theme, duck gold accents, and deep integration with TMDb Helper and Rabitewatch. Designed for a clean, curated home screen experience.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

littleduck is a custom Kodi skin built on Estuary with a Netflix-inspired dark theme, duck gold accents, and deep integration with TMDb Helper and Rabitewatch. Designed for a clean, curated home screen experience.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

littleduck is a custom Kodi skin built on Estuary with a Netflix-inspired dark theme, duck gold accents, and deep integration with TMDb Helper and Rabitewatch. Designed for a clean, curated home screen experience.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.
